data.title: The compromise proposal for the crypto market structure bill has sparked industry divisions, with Coinbase expressing dissatisfaction with the stablecoin yield terms.
data.description: The compromise proposed by US senators this week regarding the stablecoin rewards section of the Clarity Act has sparked mixed reactions within the crypto industry. Coinbase has expressed its dissatisfaction with the latest compromise text to senators' staff but has not yet publicly stated its opposition. The proposal was presented to crypto industry stakeholders on Monday, with some expressing dissatisfaction while others said the outcome was better than expected. The proposal would instruct some regulatory agencies to develop rules to clarify the regulatory approach for rewards-based activities, but industry concerns exist that regulators might set subjective standards. Furthermore, the text could limit companies' ability to link rewards to the volume of stablecoin transactions. During an industry conference call this week, Coinbase diverged from other stakeholders, with some companies arguing that giving up certain stablecoin rewards is too costly, while others believe that losing the Clarity Act poses a greater risk to the overall legislative framework of the crypto industry. Previously, news of the compromise had already impacted the market, with Circle's stock price falling 20% ​​on Tuesday before recovering slightly on Wednesday. White House crypto advisor Patrick Witt criticized related predictions on the X platform as "uninformed" and stated that "everything will be resolved." The final text is expected to be released by the end of this week or early next week.

data.title: XT.COM will launch BPUSDT and BSBUSDT USDT USDT perpetual contracts.
data.description: XT.COM will simultaneously launch BPUSDT and BSBUSDT U-margined perpetual contracts on March 26, 2026 at 14:00 (UTC+8), both supporting up to 10x leverage. It is understood that BPUSDT and BSBUSDT contracts do not currently support order placement. XT stated that it will continue to launch more contract trading pairs and related promotions in the future.

data.title: BlackRock President Warns of Economic Risks from Iran Conflict
data.description: BlackRock President Rob Kapito has expressed concerns that investors might be underestimating the economic risks associated with the ongoing conflict in Iran. Bloomberg posted on X that Kapito believes these tensions could negatively impact growth and increase inflation, even if the conflict is resolved quickly. Kapito's remarks highlight the potential long-term economic implications of geopolitical instability, urging investors to consider these factors in their financial strategies.

data.title: Federal Housing Finance Agency Urges DOJ to Investigate New York Mortgages
data.description: Federal Housing Finance Agency Director Bill Pulte has reached out to the U.S. Department of Justice, urging prosecutors to examine mortgages associated with New York Attorney General Letitia James for potential fraud. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the significance of this request. The investigation seeks to uncover any fraudulent activities linked to these mortgages, reflecting ongoing scrutiny in the housing finance sector. The move underscores the agency's commitment to ensuring transparency and accountability in mortgage dealings.

data.title: OpenAI Invests in AI Startup Isara Valued at $650 Million
data.description: OpenAI has made an investment in the artificial intelligence startup Isara. According to ChainCatcher, the Wall Street Journal reported that Isara recently raised $94 million from investors, and OpenAI's investment values the company at $650 million.

data.title: Citigroup's Jan Metzger Resigns as Co-Head of Investment Banking for Asia
data.description: Jan Metzger, who served as the co-head of investment banking for Asia at Citigroup, has resigned from his position. Bloomberg posted on X, noting that his departure comes six months after the company appointed a new executive to share the role. Metzger's exit marks a significant change in the leadership structure of Citigroup's investment banking division in the region. The firm has not yet announced a successor or any immediate plans to fill the vacancy left by Metzger's resignation.

data.title: A whale withdrew 11,999 ETH, worth $26 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, after a month of silence, a whale (0xd55...bf25) withdrew 11,999 ETH from Coinbase and staked them, worth $26 million. Currently, this whale holds 22,618 ETH, worth $49 million, and has made a profit of $1.2 million.

data.title: Trump: Iran dares not admit to negotiations; the US has won too decisively in Iran.
data.description: Speaking at a fundraising dinner for a Republican congressional committee in Washington, D.C., President Trump insisted that negotiations with Iran were ongoing, saying that "Iran desperately wants a deal, but it's afraid to say it." Trump claimed this was because its leaders were "afraid of being killed by their own people, and afraid of being killed by the United States." He also stated that the U.S. had "won too decisively" in Iran. (Jin Shi)

data.title: AI Agents Drive Solana Network's On-Chain Payments
data.description:
On March 26, Solana Foundation's Chief Product Officer Vibhu Norby highlighted the significant role of AI agents in driving on-chain payments during the Digital Asset Summit (DAS) in New York. According to BlockBeats, the Solana network has processed 15 million transactions from AI agents, primarily for machine-to-machine commercial interactions, with stablecoins becoming the default settlement tool for AI agent payments.

Norby emphasized the programmable nature of AI agent payments, which offers unique advantages in the crypto payment landscape. He believes this trend will fundamentally transform the monetization model of the internet, enabling micropayments as low as fractions of a cent based on usage, a feat unattainable by traditional payment systems. Solana is often a top choice for AI agents opting for crypto payments. It is anticipated that in the future, 95% to 99% of crypto transactions will be initiated by large language models, shifting the primary mode of user interaction with crypto networks to AI agents.

data.title: High-Stakes Bet on Rockets in NBA Game Against Timberwolves
data.description: An account with a profit exceeding $440,000 has placed a $300,000 wager on the Rockets in the Polymarket market for the NBA regular season game against the Timberwolves. According to NS3.AI, the position was initiated at 55.3 cents.

data.title: Base's design director announces joining X platform as design lead.
data.description: Benji Taylor, Design Director at Base, announced on the X platform that he has joined the platform and will lead the design team, adding that he looks forward to working closely with Elon Musk, Nikita Bier, and the rest of the team.

data.title: Rio Tinto Concludes Diamond Mining Operations After Half a Century
data.description: Rio Tinto has ceased its diamond mining operations, closing its final mine dedicated to the gemstone. Bloomberg posted on X, marking the end of a business that spanned over fifty years. The closure signifies a significant shift for the company, which has been a prominent player in the diamond industry. Rio Tinto's decision to end its diamond mining activities reflects broader trends in the industry and the company's strategic focus on other mineral resources. The move comes as the company seeks to optimize its portfolio and concentrate on areas with higher growth potential. This development marks a pivotal moment in the history of Rio Tinto's operations, as it transitions away from diamond mining after decades of involvement.

data.title: Ireland's Economic Resilience Tested by Iran Conflict's Impact on Energy Prices
data.description: Ireland's economy, recognized as one of the strongest in Europe, is facing challenges due to the ongoing conflict in Iran. Bloomberg posted on X that the Irish central bank anticipates that rising energy prices, a consequence of the conflict, will likely slow domestic economic growth. The situation underscores the interconnectedness of global events and their potential impact on national economies. As energy costs surge, Ireland's economic stability is being put to the test, highlighting the broader implications of geopolitical tensions on European markets.

data.title: A wallet suspected of being linked to Bitmine received 50,000 ETH from FalconX, worth $108 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a wallet suspected to be related to Bitmine (0xA17...7dc9) received 50,000 ETH from FalconX, worth $108.37 million.

data.title: UK Government Mandates Use of Domestic Steel in Public Projects
data.description: The UK government has announced a new policy requiring all departments to utilize domestically produced steel for public projects. According to Jin10, this measure aims to support the local steel industry and ensure that public funds are invested in British manufacturing. Departments seeking to procure steel from overseas must provide a valid justification for doing so. This initiative is part of a broader strategy to bolster the national economy and reduce reliance on foreign imports.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump: National Guard May Be Deployed to Airports If Necessary
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has announced the potential deployment of the National Guard to airports if deemed necessary. According to Jin10, this measure is being considered to ensure security and manage operations effectively. The decision comes amid heightened concerns over safety and logistical challenges at major airports. Trump emphasized that the deployment would be a precautionary step to maintain order and facilitate smooth functioning. The administration is closely monitoring the situation and will take action based on evolving circumstances.

data.title: The US XRP spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $1.264 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the XRP spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $1.264 million yesterday (March 25th, Eastern Time). Only the Bitwise XRP ETF (XRP) saw net inflows yesterday, with a single-day net inflow of $1.264 million, bringing its total historical net inflow to $377 million. As of press time, the XRP spot ETF has a total net asset value of $996 million, an XRP net asset ratio of 1.15%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $1.211 billion.

data.title: U.S. Embassy in Iraq Activates Air Defense Alarm
data.description: The U.S. Embassy in Iraq activated its air defense alarm in the early hours of the 26th local time, according to Jin10. This development highlights ongoing security concerns in the region. Further details on the incident have not been disclosed.

data.title: An account with over $440,000 in profits purchased $300,000 worth of NBA regular season game footage showing the Rockets defeating the Timberwolves.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, an account (address: 0xb6d6e99d3bfe055874a04279f659f009fd57be17) that profited over $440,000 in the Polymarket "NBA Regular Season Rockets vs. Timberwolves" prediction event purchased $300,000 worth of shares in favor of the Rockets to defeat the Timberwolves, at an opening price of 55.3¢. The NBA regular season game between the Rockets and the Timberwolves will start at 9:30 AM Beijing time today. The NBA regular season is currently nearing its end, with the Rockets holding a 43-28 record, ranking 6th in the Western Conference; the Timberwolves have a 44-28 record, ranking 5th in the Western Conference. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, anticipating changes before prices are set.

data.title: Polymarket Introduces Taker Fees Across Most Trading Categories
data.description:
On March 26, Polymarket, a prediction market platform, announced a significant policy change. According to BlockBeats, starting March 30, the platform will implement Taker fees across nearly all trading categories. The new fee structure features variable rates, with cryptocurrency-related contracts reaching a peak rate of 1.8%. Actual fees will vary based on share prices and market dynamics.

Categories such as sports, finance, politics, culture, weather, and general predictions will have lower tiered rates, while mention-based and certain economic predictions will see higher peak rates of around 1.5%.

Notably, geopolitical predictions will remain entirely fee-free, highlighting Polymarket's strategic focus on high-risk global events. This change marks the end of Polymarket's long-standing appeal of offering zero fees.
